If we cannot find the countrybasedvalidation object, it is not possible to submit a declaration.

nodes.detail: Country equal to IBAN country? expression=substring($Form/IBAN, 0,2) = $Country_ISO3166_1/Letters_2

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: DeclarationForm.OCh_BankAcountDetailsComplete
NODES=66; EDGES=80
1. START
2. DECISION Bank country filled? expression=$Form/DeclarationForm.Form_Country_Bank != empty
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve Country_ISO3166_1 over association Form_Country_Bank from Form
  5. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve CountryBasedValidation over association CountryBasedValidation_Country_ISO3166_1 from Country_ISO3166_1
  6. DECISION Found? expression=$CountryBasedValidation != empty
  7. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    8. DECISION IBAN required? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/isIBANRequired
    9. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      10. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
      11. DECISION Bankaccount required? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/isBankAccountRequired
      12. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        13. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        14. DECISION Bankaccount holder name filled?
        15. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          16. DECISION Swift required? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/isSwiftRequired
          17. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            18. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
            19. DECISION Has bankcode? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/hasBankCode
            20. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
              21. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
              22. DECISION Name financial institution required? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/isNameFinancialInstitutionRequired
              23. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                24. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
                25. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_BankAccountDetailsComplete=true; refreshInClient=true)
                26. END
              27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                28. DECISION Name financial institution filled?
                29. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                  30. REF ExclusiveMerge
                31. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                  32. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
                  33. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
                  34. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
                  35. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_BankAccountDetailsComplete=false; refreshInClient=false)
                  36. END
            37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
              38. DECISION Bankcode required? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/isBankCodeRequired
              39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                40. REF ExclusiveMerge
              41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                42. DECISION Bankcode filled?
                43. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                  44. DECISION Has bankcode length? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/hasControlLengthBankCode
                  45. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                    46. REF ExclusiveMerge
                  47. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                    48. DECISION Correct bankcode length? expression=length($Form/BankCode) = $CountryBasedValidation/ControlLengthBankCode
                    49. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                      50. REF ExclusiveMerge
                    51. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                      52. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
                      53. REF ExclusiveMerge
                54. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                  55. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
                  56. REF ExclusiveMerge
          57. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            58. DECISION Swift/BIC filled?
            59. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
              60. DECISION Has swift length? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/hasSwiftLength
              61. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                62. REF ExclusiveMerge
              63. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                64. DECISION Correct swift length? expression=length($Form/BICCode) = $CountryBasedValidation/SwiftLength
                65. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                  66. REF ExclusiveMerge
                67. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                  68. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow DeclarationForm.SUB_BicCode_LengthCheck -> Succes
                  69. DECISION Correct Length? expression=length($Form/BICCode) = $CountryBasedValidation/SwiftLength
                  70. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                    71. REF ExclusiveMerge
                  72. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                    73. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
                    74. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
                    75. REF ExclusiveMerge
            76. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
              77. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
              78. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
              79. REF ExclusiveMerge
        80. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          81. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          82. REF ExclusiveMerge
      83. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        84. DECISION Bankaccount filled?
        85. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          86. DECISION Has bankaccount length? expression=$CountryBasedValidation/hasBankAccountLength
          87. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            88. REF ExclusiveMerge
          89. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            90. DECISION Correct bankaccount length? expression=length($Form/BankAccount) = $CountryBasedValidation/BankAccountLength
            91. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
              92. REF ExclusiveMerge
            93. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
              94. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
              95. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
              96. REF ExclusiveMerge
        97. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          98. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          99. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
          100. REF ExclusiveMerge
    101. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      102. DECISION IBAN filled?
      103. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        104. DECISION Country equal to IBAN country? expression=substring($Form/IBAN, 0,2) = $Country_ISO3166_1/Letters_2
        105. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          106. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow DeclarationForm.VAL_IBAN -> IBANValid
          107. DECISION IBAN valid? expression=$IBANValid
          108. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            109. REF ExclusiveMerge
          110. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            111. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
            112. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
            113. REF ExclusiveMerge
        114. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          115. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_BankAccountDetailsComplete=false; refreshInClient=false)
          116. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          117. END
      118. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        119. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_BankAccountDetailsComplete=false; refreshInClient=false)
        120. END
  121. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    122. ACTION ShowMessageAction: show message (text=It is not possible to file a declaration for this country. Please get in touch with the Fi..., type=Information, blocking=true)
    123. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_BankAccountDetailsComplete=false; refreshInClient=false)
    124. END
125. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  126. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_BankAccountDetailsComplete=false; refreshInClient=false)
  127. END

VU Reference filled? expression=$Form/VUReference != empty and trim($Form/VUReference) != ''
nodes.detail: VU Reference filled? expression=$Form/VUReference != empty and trim($Form/VUReference) != ''

flows.pseudocode:
FLOW Microflow: DeclarationForm.OCh_DeclarationComplete
NODES=24; EDGES=29
1. START
2. DECISION VU Reference filled? expression=$Form/VUReference != empty and trim($Form/VUReference) != ''
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow DeclarationForm_Integration.SUB_WBSorCostCenterExist -> WBSValid
  5. DECISION WBS exist? expression=$WBSValid = true
  6. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    7. DECISION Currency filled? expression=$Form/DeclarationForm.Form_Currency != empty
    8. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
      9. DECISION Is NL declaration? expression=$Form/DeclarationForm.Form_Country/CountriesV5.Country_ISO3166_1/Letters_2 = 'NL'
      10. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
        11. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
        12. ACTION RetrieveAction: retrieve DeclarationLineList over association DeclarationLine_Form from Form
        13. DECISION Has lines? expression=$DeclarationLineList != empty
        14. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          15. DECISION Short description filled? expression=$Form/HeaderText != empty
          16. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
            17. DECISION Long description filled? expression=$Form/Description != empty
            18. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
              19. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable isDeclarationLineValid=true
              20. LOOP iterate DeclarationLineList as IteratorDeclarationLine
                21. LOOP BODY
                  22. NODE BreakEvent: BreakEvent
                  23. DECISION Valid? expression=$DeclarationLineValid
                  24. ACTION ChangeVariableAction: change variable isDeclarationLineValid=false
                  25. ACTION MicroflowCallAction: call microflow DeclarationForm.VAL_DeclarationLine_WithoutMessage -> DeclarationLineValid
                  26. NODE ContinueEvent: ContinueEvent
              27. DECISION Declaration line valid? expression=$isDeclarationLineValid
              28. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
                29. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_DeclarationComplete=true; refreshInClient=true)
                30. END
              31. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
                32. NODE ExclusiveMerge: ExclusiveMerge
                33. ACTION ChangeObjectAction: change Form (FormLayout_DeclarationComplete=false; refreshInClient=true)
                34. END
            35. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
              36. REF ExclusiveMerge
          37. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
            38. REF ExclusiveMerge
        39. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          40. REF ExclusiveMerge
      41. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
        42. DECISION Currency EUR? expression=$Form/DeclarationForm.Form_Currency/DeclarationForm.Currency/Code = 'EUR'
        43. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
          44. REF ExclusiveMerge
        45. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
          46. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
          47. REF ExclusiveMerge
    48. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
      49. REF ExclusiveMerge
  50. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    51. ACTION ValidationFeedbackAction: ValidationFeedbackAction (errorHandlingType=Rollback)
    52. REF ExclusiveMerge
53. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  54. REF ExclusiveMerge

NODES=27; EDGES=25
1. START
2. DECISION Lengte BSN = 9 expression=length($BSN) = 9
3. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
  4. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer1=substring($BSN, 0,1)
  5. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer1_int=parseInteger($Cijfer1)
  6. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer2=substring($BSN, 1,1)
  7. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer2_int=parseInteger($Cijfer2)
  8. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer3=substring($BSN, 2,1)
  9. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer3_int=parseInteger($Cijfer3)
  10. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer4=substring($BSN, 3,1)
  11. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer4_int=parseInteger($Cijfer4)
  12. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer5=substring($BSN, 4,1)
  13. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer5_int=parseInteger($Cijfer5)
  14. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer6=substring($BSN, 5,1)

  16. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer7=substring($BSN, 6,1)
  17. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer7_int=parseInteger($Cijfer7)
  18. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer8=substring($BSN, 7,1)
  19. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer8_int=parseInteger($Cijfer8)
  20. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer9=substring($BSN, 8,1)
  21. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable Cijfer9_int=parseInteger($Cijfer9)
  22. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable CalculatedBSN=($Cijfer1_int * 9) + ($Cijfer2_int * 8) + ($Cijfer3_int * 7) + ($Cijfer4_int * 6) + ($Cijfer5_int * 5) + ($Cijfer6_int * 4) + ($Cijfer7_int * 3) + ($Cijfer8_int * 2) + ($Cijfer9_int * -1)
  23. ACTION CreateVariableAction: create variable BSN11=$CalculatedBSN : 11
  24. DECISION BSN valid? expression=round($BSN11) = $BSN11
  25. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=true
    26. END
  27. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
    28. END
29. BRANCH when EnumerationCase=false
  30. END
